title: schmidelia pinnata
intro: Schmidelia pinnata, also known as the African bush willow, is a plant species that belongs to the family Polygalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schmidelia pinnata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Schmidelia pinnata include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
